title: Fix vote notification firing multiple times

log.context: Fix vote notification firing multiple times

Done. Here's what was changed in `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`:

**Before:** After each upsert, `getWinner()` was called on the new counts, and if any option had >= 3 votes, `notifyVoteWinner` fired — every single time that option was voted on after crossing the threshold.

**Fix:** `getVoteCounts` is now called once *before* the upsert to capture `prevCounts`. After the upsert, the notification only fires if `prevCounts[winner] < 3` — meaning this vote is the one that first crossed the thres...(truncated)
